news.title:
India assesses pharma, textiles, fertilizers supply chain amid West Asia war.
Focus is on identifying structural weaknesses and supply chain dependencies.
news.summary:

news.title:
Aarti Industries targets doubling FY28 EBITDA to ₹1,800-2,200 cr via cost optimization, volume/margin ramp-up, and capex growth.
The company, with ₹14,957 cr mcap, allocated ₹1,100 cr for FY26 capex and aims for debt/EBITDA below 2.5x, ROCE >15%.
news.summary:
Aarti Industries targets doubling FY28 EBITDA to ₹1,800-2,200 cr via cost optimization, volume/margin ramp-up, and capex growth.
The company, with ₹14,957 cr mcap, allocated ₹1,100 cr for FY26 capex and aims for debt/EBITDA below 2.5x, ROCE >15%.

news.title:
Aarti Industries rose 4.2% to Rs 448.3 after securing a multi-year supply deal.
The agreement, valid till 2030, may generate Rs 150M revenue, boosting medium-term visibility.
news.summary:
Aarti Industries rose 4.2% to Rs 448.3 after securing a multi-year supply deal.
The agreement, valid till 2030, may generate Rs 150M revenue, boosting medium-term visibility.

news.title:
Aarti Industries signs $150M multi-year supply contract with global agrochemical major till March 2030.
Contract involves critical agrochemical intermediate for crop protection, boosting utilization without extra capital expenditure.
news.summary:
Aarti Industries signs $150M multi-year supply contract with global agrochemical major till March 2030.

news.title:
Aarti Industries expands supply deal with global firm, plans Rs 200-250 crore investment for feedstock production.
Project at Dahej SEZ aims to improve cost efficiency and EBITDA margins over 15 years.
news.summary:

news.title:
US tariff reduction from 50% to 18% under the 2026 trade deal boosts Indian chemical exports, valued at $5.7B in FY24.
Beneficiaries include Aarti Industries, SRF, UPL, Aether Industries, and Navin Fluorine, all reporting significant YoY revenue growth.
news.summary:
US tariff reduction from 50% to 18% under the 2026 trade deal boosts Indian chemical exports, valued at $5.7B in FY24.
Beneficiaries include Aarti Industries, SRF, UPL, Aether Industries, and Navin Fluorine, all reporting significant YoY revenue growth.

news.title:
Aarti Industries' revenue grew 11% QoQ to Rs. 2,492 Cr, EBITDA up 11% QoQ to Rs. 323 Cr.
Exports contributed 65% of revenue; Rs. 1,100 Cr capex planned for FY26 with advanced projects.
news.summary:
Aarti Industries' revenue grew 11% QoQ to Rs. 2,492 Cr, EBITDA up 11% QoQ to Rs. 323 Cr.
Exports contributed 65% of revenue; Rs. 1,100 Cr capex planned for FY26 with advanced projects.

news.title:
India-US trade deal cuts tariffs on Indian chemical exports to 18% from 50%, boosting competitiveness.
Stocks to watch: Aarti Industries, Navin Fluorine, Gujarat Fluorochemicals, Laxmi Organic, Vinati Organics, SRF Ltd.
news.summary:
India-US trade deal cuts tariffs on Indian chemical exports to 18% from 50%, boosting competitiveness.
Stocks to watch: Aarti Industries, Navin Fluorine, Gujarat Fluorochemicals, Laxmi Organic, Vinati Organics, SRF Ltd.

news.title: Aarti Industries paid full tariff on 40% of US exports, contributing 18% to revenue.
news.summary: Aarti Industries paid full tariff on 40% of US exports, contributing 18% to revenue.

news.title:
Aarti Industries' Q3 EBITDA rose to 3.22B from 2.3B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 13.9% from 12.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Aarti Industries' Q3 EBITDA rose to 3.22B from 2.3B YoY.
EBITDA margin improved to 13.9% from 12.5% YoY.

news.title:
HDFC Securities gives 'Add' rating to Somany, J Kumar, Aarti, Aster, Hitachi, Torrent; 'Buy' for Amber, MCX, Lupin, Cummins, Apollo.
Torrent Pharma projected for steady growth via branded franchise, launches, Brazil traction, US generics turnaround, and stable margins.
